name: Ruangguru
description: Indonesia's largest EdTech platform offering online tutoring, test prep, and school management tools for K-12 students across Southeast Asia and beyond.
innovation_rationale: Pioneered live one-to-many online tutoring in Indonesia, reaching 22 million registered learners by 2023.
market_traction_rationale: Raised $150M Series C in 2021 led by Tiger Global and General Atlantic at a reported $1B+ valuation.
competitiveness_rationale: Dominant K-12 brand in Indonesia with localized Bahasa content and partnerships with 300+ schools nationwide.
product_depth_rationale: Offers Ruangbelajar LMS, Brain Academy offline centers, and UTBK test-prep across web and mobile apps.
social_proof_rationale: Named to Forbes Asia 100 to Watch list in 2020 and featured in Google Play Best of 2019 Indonesia.

name: CoderSchool
description: Vietnam-based coding bootcamp providing full-stack and data science programs for career switchers and university graduates in Ho Chi Minh City.
innovation_rationale: First Vietnamese bootcamp to offer income-share agreements tied to graduate job placement since 2018.
market_traction_rationale: Graduated 3,000+ students across Vietnam with reported 85% job placement within 6 months of completion.

name: TotallyFakeEdTechQA
description: An amazing innovative platform with a strong team serving customers worldwide across many industries with cutting edge technology.
innovation_rationale: Very innovative solution with a strong team and great technology.
market_traction_rationale: Good market position with excellent growth potential in the region.

name: Ruangguru Indonesia
description: Indonesia's largest EdTech platform offering online tutoring, test prep, and school management tools for K-12 students across Southeast Asia and beyond.
innovation_rationale: Duplicate entry added intentionally to test whether the QA agent catches same-domain duplicates in one batch.
